pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-011 (Data Governance/Task) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.409, highest: DCWF at 0.409). Domain prior: edge. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. IC-level data quality analysis: profiling, quality rule authoring, reporting, exception handling, and quality metrics measurement.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case classification, composite 0.409, and Data Governance (DG) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Governance KSA (composite 0.409)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Quality Analyst job postings does not surface this Data Governance competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
